title: Super Mario Galaxy - 4K 60 FPS Test
description:
Just a simple test to see how well YouTube can handle a high bitrate 4K 60FPS video. The video is, at some places, stuttering a little bit because my PC is almost too slow to handle such high quality Wii emulated stuff :)

Recorded with Dolphin at 3840x2160 which was archived on a 1080p monitor via NVidia DSR (Dynamic Super Resolution) and recorded with ShadowPlay, then uploaded directly to YouTube with no post-rendering.
The only thing I fixed was exporting, normalizing and then re-importing the audio with mp4box due to me screwing a few settings up at first. The video itself remained untouched.

PC Specs:
• Intel i7-3770K at 3.50 GHz
• NVidia GTX 970
• 16 GB RAM

Dolphin:
• Direct3D 11
• 6x Native Rendering Resolution
• Anti-Aliasing 4x 
• Anisotropic Filtering 4x
• Fullscreen
